title: Song: Fear in the Night.
content:
I am afraid to-night,
            We are too glad, too gay,
        Our life too sweet, too bright
            To last another day.

title: In Absence

title: Midwinter Madness.
content:

        Is simply beastly.    Thus the poet spake,

title: At a Lecture.
content:
